title: Roasted Irish Asparagus Roast
description: A delicious and adventurous Irish dish featuring roasted asparagus, perfect for a low-carb diet. This recipe is served in a bento box for a fun and unique presentation.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Toss the asparagus with olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder in a bowl.
Spread the asparagus out in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast the asparagus in the preheated oven for 12 minutes.
Remove the asparagus from the oven and sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
Return the asparagus to the oven and roast for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the asparagus from the oven and squeeze with lemon juice.
Serve the asparagus in a bento box with a side of kimchi.
Garnish with additional parmesan cheese if desired.
